name: gallup_wellbeing_battery_anchor
guidance: Keep positive well-being answers calibrated. Use middle categories for mixed circumstances, and reserve extreme agreement for support types whose circumstances strongly fit the statement.

future_life_optimism: pessimistic about life five years from now
moderately optimistic about life five years from now
highly optimistic about life five years from now
daily_purpose: low daily purpose and limited interest in daily activities
financial_security: financially strained and often worried about money
community_fit: feels poorly matched to the local area
feels moderately matched to the local area
feels very well matched to the local area
response_style: uses extreme agreement only for very strong well-being
uses middle categories for mixed circumstances
answers strongly when the statement matches daily experience
